headline: Jane Fraser Set a New Course for Citigroup. It’s Working for Customers—and Investors.
summary: Jane Fraser isn’t the first CEO to try to turn around  Citigroup  But she might be the first to succeed where others have stalled.  Under her leadership, the bank has shed some overseas banking units, cut costs, and restructured its strategy around five units: services, markets, banking, consumer cards, and wealth.  Fraser, 58, has recruited talent from competitors to help spearhead her strategy.
